scripts.prebuild: schema="${PRISMA_SCHEMA_PATH:-./prisma/schema.prisma}"; app_root="${MEETPOINT_APP_ROOT:-${COREACADEMY_APP_ROOT:-}}"; if [ ! -f "$schema" ] && [ -n "$app_root" ]; then schema="$app_root/prisma/schema.prisma"; fi; if [ ! -f "$schema" ] && [ -f /home/nova3034/api-meetpoint/prisma/schema.prisma ]; then schema=/home/nova3034/api-meetpoint/prisma/schema.prisma; fi; prisma generate --schema="$schema"
scripts.postinstall: schema="${PRISMA_SCHEMA_PATH:-./prisma/schema.prisma}"; app_root="${MEETPOINT_APP_ROOT:-${COREACADEMY_APP_ROOT:-}}"; if [ ! -f "$schema" ] && [ -n "$app_root" ]; then schema="$app_root/prisma/schema.prisma"; fi; if [ ! -f "$schema" ] && [ -f /home/nova3034/api-meetpoint/prisma/schema.prisma ]; then schema=/home/nova3034/api-meetpoint/prisma/schema.prisma; fi; prisma generate --schema="$schema"
scripts.prisma:generate: schema="${PRISMA_SCHEMA_PATH:-./prisma/schema.prisma}"; app_root="${MEETPOINT_APP_ROOT:-${COREACADEMY_APP_ROOT:-}}"; if [ ! -f "$schema" ] && [ -n "$app_root" ]; then schema="$app_root/prisma/schema.prisma"; fi; if [ ! -f "$schema" ] && [ -f /home/nova3034/api-meetpoint/prisma/schema.prisma ]; then schema=/home/nova3034/api-meetpoint/prisma/schema.prisma; fi; prisma generate --schema="$schema"
scripts.prisma:verify: node -e "const {UserRole, Prisma}=require('@prisma/client'); if (UserRole?.ADMIN !== 'ADMIN') throw new Error('Invalid Prisma Client: UserRole.ADMIN is missing'); console.log(JSON.stringify({prismaClient: Prisma.prismaVersion.client, userRoleAdmin: UserRole.ADMIN}))"
scripts.prisma:migrate: schema="${PRISMA_SCHEMA_PATH:-./prisma/schema.prisma}"; app_root="${MEETPOINT_APP_ROOT:-${COREACADEMY_APP_ROOT:-}}"; if [ ! -f "$schema" ] && [ -n "$app_root" ]; then schema="$app_root/prisma/schema.prisma"; fi; if [ ! -f "$schema" ] && [ -f /home/nova3034/api-meetpoint/prisma/schema.prisma ]; then schema=/home/nova3034/api-meetpoint/prisma/schema.prisma; fi; prisma migrate dev --schema="$schema"
scripts.prisma:migrate:deploy: schema="${PRISMA_SCHEMA_PATH:-./prisma/schema.prisma}"; app_root="${MEETPOINT_APP_ROOT:-${COREACADEMY_APP_ROOT:-}}"; if [ ! -f "$schema" ] && [ -n "$app_root" ]; then schema="$app_root/prisma/schema.prisma"; fi; if [ ! -f "$schema" ] && [ -f /home/nova3034/api-meetpoint/prisma/schema.prisma ]; then schema=/home/nova3034/api-meetpoint/prisma/schema.prisma; fi; prisma migrate deploy --schema="$schema"
scripts.prisma:migrate:repair-known-failed: schema="${PRISMA_SCHEMA_PATH:-./prisma/schema.prisma}"; app_root="${MEETPOINT_APP_ROOT:-${COREACADEMY_APP_ROOT:-}}"; if [ ! -f "$schema" ] && [ -n "$app_root" ]; then schema="$app_root/prisma/schema.prisma"; fi; if [ ! -f "$schema" ] && [ -f /home/nova3034/api-meetpoint/prisma/schema.prisma ]; then schema=/home/nova3034/api-meetpoint/prisma/schema.prisma; fi; prisma migrate resolve --rolled-back 20260531150000_add_pii_encryption_fields --schema="$schema" || true
